code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple failures within short timeframe
    - Safety hazards/complete failure + anger/returns
    - Updates negating initial satisfaction →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Underperforms competitors & requires excessive workarounds
    - Significant degradation despite proper care →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with temporary adequacy
    - Satisfies basic needs without enthusiasm →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Explicit star deduction for specific flaws →4
    - Style praise + functional limitations
    - Maintenance requirements affecting convenience →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Core excellence outweighing maintenance/feature gaps
    - Exceeds skeptical expectations →5
    - "Worth the effort" acceptance of requirements →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Maintenance: "Annoying but needed" →4 vs "Worth it" →5
    - Comparisons: Negative →2, Neutral→3, Positive-with-limits→4
    - Durability: Short lifespan→2, Accepted tradeoff→5
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. New models are junk!"
<Reasoning>Multiple rapid failures with quality condemnation</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Underperforms Bissel/Rug Doctor - only surface cleans"
<Reasoning>Negative competitor comparison</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Adequate for light use but bends with heavy items"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy with limitations</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Superior grind quality but requires weekly calibration. Deducted star"
<Reasoning>Explicit deduction for maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Solved decade-old cleaning problem despite weekly maintenance!"
<Reasoning>Core excellence justifies effort</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "These napkins require ironing after washing. Deducted a star"
<Reasoning>Convenience impact triggers star reduction</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Surprisingly effective despite initial doubts - transformed my routine"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Cotton bathmat stays soft but takes hours to dry completely"
<Reasoning>Material praise with significant drying inconvenience</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Compact design rusted quickly. Looks great but flawed"
<Reasoning>Style praise with functional failure</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Flawless organization despite basic design. Worth every penny!"
<Reasoning>Unqualified endorsement of core function</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (40 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 14
  gold 5 -> 4: 13
  gold 4 -> 3: 4
  gold 2 -> 1: 2
  gold 1 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I've never tried an air purifier before, though I know people who have/had them. This one was not impressive. First, it has an odor. I don't know if it's because of impurities that emit a smell once trapped in the gadget and exposed to heat from the ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 2, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "These are decent napkins for everyday use. They aren't as soft as my more expensive napkins but the material is nice enough for informal dinners. They are 100 percent cotton so will shrink if you wash and dry with heated settings. I've washed them on..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "If you're looking for a very budget priced bed skirt, this would be it. I have two twin beds in my guest room and after spending more than enough on all the other bedding and decorative pillows and such on them, I knew I needed bed skirts but hated p..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "The great thing about this product is that it works perfectly. The bad thing is that if you want to buy it on Amazon now (as of September 2011), you'll have to wait for 1 to 2 months.
But a little about the device. Personally, I am very satisfied. Th..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 40 errors, 17 borderline out of 80 examples."}
